title: Myosotis tineoi
intro: Myosotis tineoi, also known as Tine's forget-me-not, is a flowering plant species in the borage family. It has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including anxiety, insomnia, and inflammation, due to its calming and anti-inflammatory properties. The bioactive constituents of Myosotis tineoi include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal effects. The plant is often used to make herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are commonly consumed to promote relaxation and reduce stress.

The classification of Myosotis tineoi is further divided into its species rank within the genus Myosotis and the Boraginaceae family.
